posts.author: Feastie (Phil Scholefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have a couple of boards that are linked with a connect board and mirror set up.
When an item in board A reaches a certain status, it triggers a new item to be created in board B and connected.
This allows a separate department to complete their tasks on items, before the team using board A continue.
Unfortunately, any updates that are added to an item in one board, can’t be seen by the other.
Collaboration in Monday.com is one of the platform’s mantras. This seems to be a fundamental miss.

Is there something planned?

Thanks, Phil.

posts.author: tenzerbenjamin (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There, I also had this need and now make use of an app called “Conversations” that can be added to the item view of any boards.

Works really well and is pretty well priced but definitely think this should be a core feature by Monday.
